settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.subtitle: Adjust the interface theme, language, and preview.
settings.appearance.themeDescription: Choose how the settings interface and terminal workspace are displayed. Changes preview immediately and save in the background.
settings.appearance.theme.system.label: Follow system
settings.appearance.theme.system.descrip: Automatically match the system light or dark preference.
settings.appearance.theme.dark.label: Dark
settings.appearance.theme.dark.descripti: Best for long terminal sessions and low-light environments.
settings.appearance.theme.dark.name: Dark
settings.appearance.theme.light.label: Light
settings.appearance.theme.light.descript: Improves clarity for daytime reading, review, and demos.
settings.appearance.theme.light.name: Light
settings.appearance.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the app interface.
